negative_cases.why_wrong: ADC Static Linearity Monitor: never reports nonzero code error.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: reports only the latest sampled error and forgets the maximum once the ADC output recovers.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: decodes the observed ADC word with reversed MSB/LSB order.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: rounds the ideal code instead of using bin-floor static quantization.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: uses seven bins instead of the full eight-code ideal span.
Retains only positive signed error instead of the absolute observed-minus-ideal code error.
Scales the retained maximum code error metric by one half.
